channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Bad Bunny Super Bowl backlash fractures conservative media
item.description: As backlash over Bad Bunny’s Super Bowl LX halftime show rippled through conservative media, a notable group of right-leaning commentators broke with ...

item.title: Jennifer Garner’s Once Upon a Farm IPO jumps 40% as the company raises $198 million
item.description: Once Upon a Farm started trading on the New York Stock Exchange Friday.

item.title: Bad Bunny Quietly Delivered a Huge Break to Two Mom‑and‑Pop Businesses
item.description: The Puerto Rican superstar uses his platform to showcase Villa’s Tacos and Caribbean Social Club.

item.title: Kroger names former Walmart executive Greg Foran as its new CEO
item.description: Kroger named former Walmart executive Greg Foran as its chief executive officer on Monday, 11 months after the abrupt resignation of its previous CEO ...

item.title: Why isn’t the day after the Super Bowl a national holiday?
item.description: It’s the day after Super Bowl Sunday, otherwise known as National Hangover Day. Because, let’s face it—even if you have zero interest in football and ...

item.title: The man who fixed Walmart’s grocery business was just appointed CEO of Kroger
item.description: Former Walmart U.S. chief Greg Foran is just the direct, no-nonsense CEO the supermarket chain urgently needs.

item.title: It’s Official: A Silly Chocolate Ad Won the Super Bowl. These Products Got the Biggest Post-Game Boost
item.description: Real-time food delivery data shows which Super Bowl commercials actually translated into sales.

item.title: Trump meme coin down 96% as Bitcoin and meme coins slide
item.description: On January 19, 2025, someone paid $75.35 to buy a Trump meme coin. Today, assuming that same investor held the cryptocurrency, the investment has lost...

item.title: Bad Bunny Didn’t Get Paid for the Super Bowl—but His Tree Performers Did
item.description: The elaborate tree-filled backdrop was powered by paid performers who logged days of rehearsals.

item.title: MrBeast Just Bought a Gen Z Banking App in a Bold Push Into Finance
item.description: The Youtube creator’s entertainment conglomerate hopes to leverage his audience to drive the venture.

item.title: ‘Every fight I have ever been in, I’ve won’: British PM Starmer vows to fight for his job after Epstein links sack cabinet
item.description: Starmer apologized to Epstein's victims last week and said he was sorry for “having believed Mandelson’s lies.”

item.title: The Trump family’s crypto portfolio is getting battered with the rest of the industry—but Melania’s memecoin has fared surprisingly well
item.description: A recent collapse in the price of Bitcoin has spurred weakness across the sector.

item.title: Shark Tank star Kevin O’Leary says you’re ‘stupid’ if you work this many hours per day
item.description: Investor and Shark Tank star Kevin O’Leary once declared that to succeed in business you must be willing to grind out 25 hour work days . He has since...

item.title: People Have Noticed That TrumpRx Looks a Lot Like GoodRx. There’s a Reason for the Similarities
item.description: A new prescription discount website from the federal government is using GoodRx as an integration partner, says the company. Will patients be better o...

item.title: Scott Galloway on why that Anthropic Super Bowl ad got under Sam Altman’s skin and exposed ‘therapy’ as the AI use case
item.description: The marketing guru and host of Prof G Markets said the ad was a “seminal moment” in the AI wars and will lead to Anthropic being more valuable than Op...
